g.title: Class that defines the mechanical and thermal properties of materials used in rotor elements. Can load predefined materials or create new ones.
name: material name (str) rho: density [kg/m³] E: Young's modulus [Pa] G_s: shear modulus [Pa] Poisson: Poisson's ratio [dimensionless]
specific_heat: specific heat [J/(kg·K)] thermal_conductivity: thermal conductivity [W/(m·K)] Used in thermo-mechanical analyses
color: color for visualization in rotor plot Assigned automatically or defined by user
Class method that returns the list of all predefined materials available in the ROSS library
Loads a predefined material by name. Ex: Material.load_material("Steel1020") Returns a Material object with all properties.
Saves a custom material to the local database for future reuse.
Steel1020: general purpose carbon steel Steel4140: alloy steel (Cr-Mo), shafts Steel4340: high strength alloy steel AISI4340: similar to 4340 Stainless316: austenitic stainless steel
Aluminum7075: Al-Zn alloy, high strength Aluminum6061: Al-Mg-Si alloy, general purpose
Custom materials can be created and saved by the user. Just provide E, G_s, rho and Poisson.
Material defines E, G, ρ for the shaft element matrices
Material required when the disk is created from geometry
